failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result showing one matching item priced at $46.13 and answered that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked which available Jigsaw Puzzle with difficulty level beginner costs more than $45.76. The tool call at steps 2-3 returned a valid matching item: item_id 1096508426, available=true, price=46.13. At step 4, the Executor had this relevant tool output but produced the opposite conclusion, saying no items match. This directly contradicts the tool result and was not resolved later; the Evaluator approved the bad answer instead of correcting it.
